summary: In weekly email Key Results, subtask evidence should enrich the parent feature status inline; subtasks must not render as separate visible items or nested detail rows.
source_links: user-feedback: subtasks appeared in the report as standalone tasks, which is incorrect
details: Do not emit or render feature-level `detail_lines` for Key Results when the goal is parent-only storytelling.
Fold named subtask evidence into the parent feature `status` so done/progress/risk/plan stay attached to the feature, not promoted to separate report items.
When a subtask has no comments but has a meaningful workflow state, preserve the subtask name plus that fallback state in the parent summary.
